name: golang-google-cloud-dev
title: golang-google-cloud-dev
description:
Google Cloud Platform APIs
Package cloud contains Google Cloud Platform APIs related types and common
functions.
.
Provides both the old google.golang.org/cloud and the new cloud.google.com/go
trees.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-google-cloud-dev because Google Cloud Platform APIs.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-google-cloud-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-google-cloud-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-google-cloud-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
